description_long: This is a long, horizontal wooden coatrack featuring a rustic, dark-stained finish. It is equipped with eight evenly spaced metal hooks attached along the lower edge, each designed to hold coats, hats, or bags. The wood appears solid and robust, with a slightly weathered texture that adds to its urban charm. The hooks are simple, utilitarian, and likely made of blackened or dark metal, providing a strong contrast to the wood. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. This coatrack is intended to be mounted on a wall, making it suitable for entryways, hallways, or garages in urban environments.
description: A long, rustic wooden wall-mounted coatrack with eight dark metal hooks and a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wooden coatrack and all eight metal hooks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the coatrack and the protrusion of the hooks from the wood.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the back of the wooden bar and the alignment of the hooks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the row of hooks extending outward.
